name: One Time Migration
description: Full one-time migration from source Teams to target Teams.

name: Delta Migration
description: Incremental delta migration to sync changes after initial migration.

name: Public Teams
description: Public teams are migrated to target tenant.

name: Private Teams
description: Private teams are migrated to target tenant.

name: Org-wide Teams
description: Organization-wide teams are migrated.

name: Standard Channels
description: Standard channels within teams are migrated.

name: Non-Admin Public Channels
description: Public channels created by non-admin users are migrated.

name: Private Channels
description: Private channels are migrated.

name: Non-Admin Private Channels
description: Private channels created by non-admin users are migrated.

name: Shared Channels
description: Shared channels are migrated.

name: Channel Members
description: Channel membership is migrated.

name: Channel Mentions
description: Channel @mentions are preserved in migrated messages.

name: User Mentions
description: User @mentions in channel messages are migrated.

name: Members Posted Username
description: Display name of the member who posted is preserved in channels.

name: Channel Description
description: Channel descriptions are migrated.

name: Replies in Channels
description: Thread replies in channels are migrated.

name: Group DMs
description: Group direct messages are migrated.

name: Non-Admin Group DMs
description: Group DMs created by non-admin users are migrated.

name: One-on-One DMs
description: One-on-one direct messages are migrated.

name: Non-Admin One-on-One DMs
description: One-on-one DMs created by non-admin users are migrated.

name: Members Posted Username (DMs)
description: Display name of the member who posted is preserved in DMs.

name: DM Members
description: DM participant membership is migrated.

name: User Mentions in DMs
description: User @mentions in DMs are migrated.

name: Replies in DMs
description: Thread replies in direct messages are migrated.

name: Text Formatting (Numbered List, Bullet List, Bold, Italic, Strike Through, Underline, Code Block, Font Colour, Font Size, Text Highlight, Quotes, Links)
description: Full text formatting including lists, bold, italic, strikethrough, underline, code block, font colour, font size, highlight, quotes, and links is preserved.

name: Emojis
description: Emojis in messages are migrated.

name: Custom Emojis
description: Custom emojis are migrated.

name: Deleted Message
description: Deleted message state or handling is supported.

name: Edited Message
description: Edited message content and edit state are migrated.

name: Scheduled Messages
description: Scheduled messages are migrated.

name: Set Delivery Options
description: Delivery options on messages are migrated.

name: Files
description: File attachments are migrated.

name: All Types of Files
description: All standard file types attached to messages are migrated.

name: Attach Cloud Files
description: Cloud file attachments are migrated.

name: Browse Teams & Channels
description: Ability to browse and attach from Teams and channels is supported.

name: Upload From Device
description: Files uploaded from device are migrated.

name: GIFs
description: GIF attachments are migrated.

name: Stickers
description: Sticker attachments are migrated.

name: Custom Stickers
description: Custom stickers are migrated.

name: Archived Channels
description: Archived channels are migrated.

name: Post in Other Channels
description: Posts shared to multiple channels are migrated.

name: Screenshots
description: Screenshot attachments are migrated.

name: Screen Recordings
description: Screen recording attachments are migrated.

name: Recorded Video Clips
description: Recorded video clip attachments are migrated.
